steps.t: A lit moon mirror must be somewhere in Máttugard. You should locate the lit moon mirror.
A lit moon mirror must be somewhere in Máttugard. You should reposition the lit moon mirror.
Another moon mirror must be somewhere else in Máttugard. You should reposition a second moon mirror.
Another moon mirror must be somewhere else in Máttugard. You should reposition a third moon mirror.
The Plaque of the Moon can be found in Máttugard. You should return to the Plaque of the Moon.
A first plaque must be somewhere in Máttugard. You should find the first plaque. 'By night, the moon reflects in my waters. 'The nobles walk by at all…
A second plaque must be somewhere in Máttugard. You should find the second plaque. 'By night, the moon reflects in my waters. 'The nobles walk by at a…
A third plaque must be somewhere in Máttugard. You should find the third plaque. 'By night, the moon reflects in my waters. 'The nobles walk by at all…
The Plaque of the Moon can be found in Máttugard. You should return to the Plaque of the Moon.
